item.title:
#Binance is building toward 3 billion users with a vision for an everyday financial app.
As mobile ...
item.description:
#Binance is building toward 3 billion users with a vision for an everyday financial app.
As mobile access expands worldwide, a more integrated financial experience can help close longstanding gaps in financial access.
See how Binance's leaders are thinking about the next phase of growth. → https://t.co/zERS10gX0x
--- @binance | ❤️ 15 | 🔁 1 | 💬 6 | 👁 619
item.author: @binance

if you always felt out of the loop on the SOTA on Imagegen, today or otherwise, this is the best 40 minutes you will find on the internet, period.
--- @swyx | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 100

item.title: The very first quadcopter prototype was the Breguet-Richet Gyroplane No. 1, created in 1907 by Bregu...
item.description:
The very first quadcopter prototype was the Breguet-Richet Gyroplane No. 1, created in 1907 by Breguet Aviation in France.
The first consumer quadcopter drone was the Parrot AR.Drone, released in 2010 by French company Parrot SA. It was also the first commercially successful mass-market drone, and the first time the word "drone" was used for a consumer product (previously "drone" only referred to unmanned military aircraft in an airplane form factor).
This was the starting point of the quadcopter drone era, which is still unfolding.
--- @fchollet | ❤️ 12 | 🔁 1 | 💬 5 | 👁 1926
item.author: @fchollet

item.title:
OpenAI 发布了 ChatGPT Images 2.0，图片生成能力全面升级，今天起对所有 ChatGPT 和 Codex 用户开放。
这次升级最直观的变化是"听得懂复杂指令了&quo...
item.description:
OpenAI 发布了 ChatGPT Images 2.0，图片生成能力全面升级，今天起对所有 ChatGPT 和 Codex 用户开放。
这次升级最直观的变化是"听得懂复杂指令了"。以前用 AI 生图，稍微复杂一点的构图就容易翻车，尤其是图里带文字、UI 界面、密集排版这些场景，基本靠运气。Images 2.0 在这些细节上进步明显，小字、图标、界面元素都能比较准确地渲染出来，分辨率最高支持 2K，宽高比从 3:1 到 1:3 都行，做横幅、海报、社交图片可以直接出成品。
另一个实用的提升是多语言文字生成。以前让 AI 在图里写中文、日文、阿拉伯文，错字乱码是常态。OpenAI 说 2.0 能生成语义连贯的非英文文本，做中文海报或多语言物料的人可以试试看实际效果如何。
最有意思的是"会思考的图片生成"。在 ChatGPT 里选择 thinking 模式后，Images 2.0 可以先联网搜索实时信息，一个提示词生成多张不同风格的图，还能自检输出结果，甚至能生成可扫描的二维码。这个能力目前限 Plus、Pro 和 Business 用户使用，Enterprise 还没上线。
底层模型 gpt-image-2 同步开放了 API 接口，知识截止到 2025 年 12 月。移动端用户需要更新到最新版本。
体验地址：https://t.co/x7pUHEXs6s
--- @dotey | ❤️ 4 | 🔁 1 | 💬 1 | 👁 904
item.author: @dotey

item.title:

item.description:
Legal stuff:
Coinbase Financial Markets is a registered futures commission merchant with the CFTC and is a member of the NFA. Not investment advice or recommendation to trade a particular contract or to employ a particular strategy. Prediction contracts are high-risk; you could lose your entire investment. Payouts depend on specific events.
--- @coinbase | ❤️ 10 | 🔁 4 | 💬 2 | 👁 10253
item.author: @coinbase

item.title: The prediction market for Apple announcing a foldable iPhone before 2027 is at 82% and currently fal...
item.description:
The prediction market for Apple announcing a foldable iPhone before 2027 is at 82% and currently falling, with traders already rethinking what Apple ships next.
Learn more ↓ https://t.co/pmJ3VDzDev
--- @coinbase | ❤️ 16 | 🔁 5 | 💬 5 | 👁 20424
item.author: @coinbase
